column1: # This fixture is deliberately synthetic: it is used solely to unit-test
# ParityDiffEngine categorisation logic WITHOUT requiring a live Java process.
#   FullMatch        — s0: identical analyses on both sides
#   LexiconGap       — s1: word unknown on Java side (count=0)
#   AnalysisCountDiff— s3: same best but different candidate count
#   BothUnknown      — s4: both sides return count=0
#   TokenizationDiff — tested in-code with separate word lists (no TSV row needed)
# Sentence 1 — LexiconGap: "blogging" unknown on Java side
# Sentence 3 — AnalysisCountDiff: same best but different candidate count
